conversation_summaries.overall_pre_game:
I felt most connected to F, I, and J because we bonded deeply over our shared drive to provide for our families and explicitly agreed to look out for one another. F and I established a strong mutual understanding of the pressure we’re under, while I and I quickly aligned on a strategy of sticking together to ensure we both succeed. I felt the least connected to A; although we had a pleasant conversation about our backgrounds and families, it felt more like a polite exchange of information than a firm strategic alliance.

I made informal agreements to keep an eye out for F, I, J, G, and H, focusing on the idea that we are stronger if we cooperate. I feel a significant amount of trust toward F and I given our high connection scores and shared values, but I am staying observant of everyone else as the game begins. I don't specifically distrust anyone yet, though I'm aware that the high stakes for our families might eventually force difficult choices.
